Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. DAVID N. BUFFINGTON, Esq. (Tel: 805-807-5197) for plaintiff Shawn Rollins;
Atty. RYAN D. DERRY, Esq. of Paul Hastings LLP (Tel: 415-856-7000) for defendants Salesforce.com, Inc. and Salesforce.com, LLC (via Zoom videoconference;
Atty. DANIEL E. LASSEN, Esq. of Curley, Hurtgen & Johnsrud LLP (Tel: 650-600-5300) for defendant Hillary Renderman (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS HILLARY RENDERMAN, SALESFORCE.COM, INC., and SALESFORCE.COM, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Salesforce.com, Inc. and Hillary Renderman's motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
